mapper.sql: pep.employee_id as pe_id, pep.company, pep.post, pep.remarks, pep.attribute1, pep.attribute2, pep.attribute3, pep.enabled_flag, pep.id, pep.create_time, pep.create_by, pep.update_time, pep.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_postother (employee_id, company, post, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_postother set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pepo.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pepo.company) > 0 then pepo.company else null end as company, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pepo.post) > 0 then pepo.post else null end as post, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pepo.remarks) > 0 then pepo.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_postother pepo join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pepo.employee_id where pepo.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pepo.company,pepo.post,pepo.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_postother pep left join pm_employee_postother_temp pept on pep.id = pept.header_id and pept.enabled_flag = 1 and pept.check_flag = 'D' and pept.instructions_flag = 'U'
